title: How to Set Up Your Development Environment
content:
Welcome to the Engineering team! Follow these steps:

1. Clone the bootstrap repo: `git clone git@github.com:acmecorp/dev-setup.git`
2. Run `./setup.sh` — installs Homebrew, Docker, nvm, and project dependencies.
3. Configure your SSH key pair and add the public key to GitHub and the bastion host.
4. Request AWS IAM access via the #it-requests Slack channel.
5. Join the #engineering and #dev-general Slack channels.
6. Attend the weekly Engineering All-Hands every Tuesday at 10 AM PT.
7. Your buddy will walk you through the codebase in your first pair-programming session.
author: People Ops

title: Navigating Your Benefits: Health, Dental & 401k
content:
You have 30 days from your start date to enroll in benefits.

**Health Insurance**: Log in to Gusto > Benefits > Medical. We offer three tiers (HMO, PPO, HDHP).
**Dental & Vision**: Bundled with medical; same enrollment window.
**401(k)**: We match up to 4% of salary. Enroll via Guideline — link in your welcome email.
**PTO**: Unlimited PTO policy. Log time off in Lattice and notify your manager in Slack.
**Parental Leave**: 16 weeks fully paid for primary caregiver; 8 weeks for secondary.

Questions? Ping #people-ops or email benefits@acmecorp.com.
author: Sales Ops

title: Company Communication Tools Guide
content:
We use the following tools — get familiar with each:

- **Slack**: Primary async chat. Join your department channel and #general, #announcements.
- **Notion**: Company wiki and project docs. Your manager will share the team Notion.
- **Google Workspace**: Email, Calendar, Drive, Meet. SSO via Okta.
- **Jira**: Engineering tickets and sprints. PM creates your first sprint tickets.
- **Lattice**: Performance reviews, 1:1 agendas, and goal tracking.
- **Zoom**: Video calls with external partners. License provisioned in your first week.

Slack etiquette: use threads for replies; set a status when in Do Not Disturb mode.
author: HR Team

title: Security & Compliance Essentials
content:
Security is everyone's responsibility. Required actions in Week 1:

1. Enable MFA on all company accounts (Google, Slack, GitHub, AWS).
2. Install CrowdStrike Falcon on your laptop — IT will push the agent automatically.
3. Complete the **Security Awareness** course in Workday LMS (≈ 45 min).
4. Never share credentials. Use 1Password (team vault) for all passwords.
5. Report phishing attempts to security@acmecorp.com immediately.
6. Do not use personal cloud storage (Dropbox, personal Drive) for work files.

Policy docs are in Notion > Security > Policies.
author: IT Team

title: Your First 30-60-90 Day Plan
content:
This plan helps you ramp up effectively.

**Days 1–30 (Learn)**:
- Complete all onboarding tasks and compliance training.
- Schedule 1:1s with every teammate and key cross-functional partner.
- Shadow existing processes; ask lots of questions.

**Days 31–60 (Contribute)**:
- Take ownership of a small project or ticket.
- Draft your OKRs with your manager in Lattice.
- Identify one process improvement opportunity.

**Days 61–90 (Lead)**:
- Deliver on your first project.
- Complete your 90-day review with your manager.
- Propose one new idea in your team's retrospective.
author: IT Team

title: IT Troubleshooting: Common First-Week Issues
content:
Common issues and how to fix them:

**Can't log in to Okta?** → Reset password at okta.acmecorp.com/forgot or ping #it-helpdesk.
**Laptop not imaging?** → Boot to recovery mode and re-run MDM enrollment.
**Slack invite expired?** → Ask your manager to resend from admin.slack.com.
**VPN not connecting?** → Ensure Cisco AnyConnect is installed; use `vpn.acmecorp.com`.
**Missing software?** → Submit a request in Jira Service Desk > IT Requests.

IT Help Desk: #it-helpdesk (Slack) | it@acmecorp.com | ext. 1000 | SLA: 4 business hours.
author: HR Team

title: Sales Playbook for New Account Executives
content:
Welcome to the Sales team! Here is what you need in Week 1:

1. **CRM Access**: Log in to Salesforce (SFDC) using your Okta credentials.
2. **Territory Assignment**: Your manager will assign your named accounts in SFDC.
3. **Product Certification**: Complete the 4-hour Sales Certification in Highspot.
4. **Shadow Calls**: Join 3 discovery calls with a senior AE in your first two weeks.
5. **Quota**: Your ramping quota for Month 1 is 25% of OTE target.
6. **Commission Plan**: Reviewed in Finance's onboarding session (Day 3).

Key contacts: Sales Ops (#sales-ops), RevOps (#revenue-ops), SE pool (#solutions-engineering).
author: Sales Ops

title: Design System & Brand Guidelines
content:
The Acme Design System lives in Figma (team: Acme Design).

**Brand Colors**: Primary #1E3A5F (Navy), Accent #F4A916 (Gold), Neutral #F5F5F5.
**Typography**: Inter for UI; Playfair Display for marketing headlines.
**Logo Usage**: Never stretch or recolor the logo. Assets in Figma > Brand Assets.
**Component Library**: Use existing components before creating new ones. PR to the Figma library requires design lead approval.
**Review Process**: All external-facing designs must be reviewed by the Brand team before handoff.

Design Slack channels: #design-critique, #brand-assets, #design-system.
author: HR Team
